debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
inst✝⁸ : NormedAddCommGroup E
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
X : ι → Ω → E
inst✝⁷ : LinearOrder ι
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
inst✝⁶ : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝⁵ : OrderTopology ι
inst✝⁴ : OrderBot ι
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace ι
inst✝² : SecondCountableTopology ι
inst✝¹ : NormedSpace ℝ E
inst✝ : CompleteSpace E
hX1 : Martingale X 𝓕 P
hX2 : ∀ (ω : Ω), RightContinuous fun x => X x ω
⊢ @ProbabilityTheory.ClassD ι Ω E inst✝⁸ mΩ instDistribLatticeOfLinearOrder.toSemilatticeInf.toPreorder ⋯ inst✝³ X 𝓕 P ↔
    UniformIntegrable X 1 P

failed_attempts:
by
  let Y := fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖
  have hY : Submartingale Y 𝓕 P := hX1.submartingale_convex_comp
    (convexOn_norm convex_univ) continuous_norm (fun t ↦ (hX1.integrable t).norm)
  have hY_rc : ∀ ω, RightContinuous (Y · ω) := fun ω ↦ (hX2 ω).norm
  have hY_nn : 0 ≤ Y := fun t ω ↦ norm_nonneg _
  have h1 : ClassD X 𝓕 P ↔ ClassD Y 𝓕 P := by
    constructor
    · intro h
      refine ⟨h.1.comp_continuous continuous_norm, ?_⟩
      rw [uniformIntegrable_iff_norm]
      convert h.2 using 2 with τ
      ext ω
      simp [stoppedValue, Y]
    · intro h
      refine ⟨hX1.adapted.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous hX2, ?_⟩
      rw [uniformIntegrable_iff_norm]
      convert h.2 using 2 with τ
      ext ω
      simp [stoppedValue, Y]
  have h2 : UniformIntegrable X 1 P ↔ UniformIntegrable Y 1 P := by
    simp_rw [UniformIntegrable, Y, norm_norm]
  rw [h1, h2]
  exact MeasureTheory.Submartingale.classD_iff_uniformIntegrable hY hY_rc hY_nn

  constructor

    let constT (t : ι) : S := ⟨fun _ ↦ t, isStoppingTime_const 𝓕 t, fun _ ↦ WithTop.coe_ne_top⟩
    have : (fun t ↦ ‖X t ·‖) = (fun T : S ↦ ‖stoppedValue X T.1 ·‖) ∘ constT := by
      ext t ω; simp [stoppedValue, constT]
    rw [this]
    exact h.uniformIntegrable.comp _
  · intro h
    let Y := fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖
    have hY_sub : Submartingale Y 𝓕 P := hX1.submartingale_convex_comp
      (convexOn_norm convex_univ) continuous_norm
      (fun t ↦ (hX1.integrable t).norm)
    have hY_cont : ∀ ω, RightContinuous (Y · ω) := fun ω ↦ (hX2 ω).norm
    have hY_nonneg : 0 ≤ Y := fun t ω ↦ norm_nonneg _
    have hY_UI : UniformIntegrable Y 1 P := by
      rw [uniformIntegrable_iff_norm] at h ⊢
      exact h
    have hY_classD := (MeasureTheory.Submartingale.classD_iff_uniformIntegrable hY_sub hY_cont hY_nonneg).mpr hY_UI
    refine ⟨hX1.adapted.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous hX2, ?_⟩
    rw [uniformIntegrable_iff_norm]
    convert hY_classD.uniformIntegrable using 2 with τ

    let S := {T | IsStoppingTime 𝓕 T ∧ ∃ t : ι, ∀ ω, T ω ≤ t}
    let f : S → ι := fun T ↦ T.2.2.1
    have h_ui : UniformIntegrable (fun T : S ↦ X (f T)) 1 P := h.comp f
    have h_cond : UniformIntegrable (fun T : S ↦ P[X (f T)|T.2.1.measurableSpace]) 1 P :=
      h_ui.condExp (fun T ↦ T.2.1.measurableSpace)
    refine h_cond.ae_eq ?_

    apply hX1.stoppedValue_ae_eq_condExp_of_le hX2 T.2.1 (Eventually.of_forall T.2.2.2) (isStoppingTime_const _ _)

  let Y := fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖

    refine uniformIntegrable_of_dominated hcond (fun ⟨T, hT, ⟨t, ht⟩⟩ ↦ ?_)

        have : T ⊓ (fun _ ↦ t) = T := by simpa [inf_eq_left] using ht
        simpa [inf_comm, this] using lem

by
  refine ⟨fun h ↦ ?_, fun h ↦ ?_⟩
  · let S := {T | IsStoppingTime 𝓕 T ∧ ∀ ω, T ω ≠ ⊤}
    let G (T : S) : (Ω → E) := stoppedValue X T.1
    let constT (t : ι) : S := ⟨fun ω : Ω => t, ⟨isStoppingTime_const 𝓕 t, by simp⟩⟩
    have eq : X = G ∘ constT := by ext; simp [constT, G, stoppedValue]
    simpa [eq] using h.2.comp constT
  · let Y := fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖
    have hY_sub : Submartingale Y 𝓕 P := hX1.submartingale_convex_comp
      (convexOn_norm convex_univ) continuous_norm
      (fun t ↦ (hX1.integrable t).norm)
    have hY_cont : ∀ ω, RightContinuous (Y · ω) := fun ω t ↦ (hX2 ω t).norm
    have hY_nonneg : 0 ≤ Y := fun t ω ↦ norm_nonneg _
    have h_bounded : UniformIntegrable (fun T : {T | IsStoppingTime 𝓕 T ∧ ∃ t : ι, ∀ ω, T ω ≤ t}
        ↦ stoppedValue Y T) 1 P := by
      rw [uniformIntegrable_iff_norm] at h
      have hcond := h.condExp' (fun T : {T | IsStoppingTime 𝓕 T ∧ ∃ t : ι, ∀ ω, T ω ≤ t} =>
        IsStoppingTime.measurableSpace_le T.2.1)
      refine uniformIntegrable_of_dominated hcond (fun ⟨T, hT, ⟨t, ht⟩⟩ => ?_)
        (fun ⟨T, hT, ⟨t, ht⟩⟩ => ⟨⟨t, ⟨T, hT, ⟨t, ht⟩⟩⟩, ?_⟩)
      · exact ((stronglyMeasurable_stoppedValue_of_le (hY_sub.1.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous
          hY_cont) hT ht).mono (𝓕.le' t)).aestronglyMeasurable
      · have : stoppedValue Y T ≤ᵐ[P] P[stoppedValue Y (fun ω => t)|hT.measurableSpace] := by
          suffices lem : stoppedValue Y ((fun ω => t) ⊓ T) ≤ᵐ[P]
            P[stoppedValue Y (fun ω => t)|hT.measurableSpace] from by
            have : T ⊓ (fun ω => t) = T := by simpa [inf_eq_left] using ht
            simpa [inf_comm, this] using lem
          exact hY_sub.stoppedValue_min_ae_le_condExp 𝓕 hY_cont
            (Eventually.of_forall (fun ω => le_rfl)) hT (isStoppingTime_const 𝓕 t)
        simp only [stoppedValue_const] at this
        filter_upwards [this] with ω hω
        apply norm_le_norm_of_abs_le_abs
        have p1 : 0 ≤ stoppedValue Y T ω := by simpa [stoppedValue] using (hY_nonneg (T ω).untopA ω)
        have p2 : |P[Y t|hT.measurableSpace] ω| = P[Y t|hT.measurableSpace] ω :=
          abs_of_nonneg (le_trans p1 hω)
        rw [← abs_of_nonneg p1, ← p2] at hω
        exact hω
    have hY_classD : ClassD Y 𝓕 P := classD_of_uniformIntegrable_bounded_stoppingTime
      h_bounded (hY_sub.1.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous hY_cont)
    refine ⟨hX1.adapted.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous hX2, ?_⟩
    rw [uniformIntegrable_iff_norm]
    convert hY_classD.uniformIntegrable
    ext τ ω
    simp [Y, stoppedValue]
